chapter_title: Review of OHS training for school staff
snippet: The principal or their delegate must ensure the school’s OHS training register or equivalent template is reviewed and updated (as required) at least annually. This can be scheduled into the school’s OHS activities calendar (XLSX) External Link . Additional reviews of required training may be required when: Training that is identified and completed can be added to the school’s OHS risk register as a control (refer to the OHS Risk Planning and Management policy for further information). Completion of OHS eLearning modules can be monitored directly by principals through the LearnED platform. Scheduling and recording OHS training Includes information on organising training, once training n... Resources Resources page containing supporting resources and links for... Includes information on recording and reviewing the level of competency of all school employees. Reviewed 07 July 2025
